DURING THE COURSE OF SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS IN ROOM #303-A, DEFENDANT RON CADY CREATED A DISTURBANCE AND MADE VERBAL OUTBURSTS IN THE PRESENCE OF JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM F.
